title: How to sync Monday.com boards with a custom SEO client dashboard?

posts.author: alexadam (Alex Adam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
I’ve built a custom client dashboard for my SEO agency on mantasdigital, and I’m trying to sync key updates (like task status and reports) between our Monday.com boards and that dashboard.

Has anyone successfully done this using webhooks or the API? Looking for tips or best practices — especially when handling custom fields and two-way sync.

Appreciate any insight!

posts.author: preslechoni1985 (Brooke)
posts.cookedHtml: I connect my Monday boards to a custom dashboard just by using webhooks and simple API calls. I pull the data I need into my dashboard and display it however I want.

posts.author: PaulMar (PaulMar)
posts.cookedHtml: i set up a simple webhook on the board and then pulled the data into my dashboard using the api. You can filter by item or column values before displaying anything

posts.author: PaulMar (PaulMar)
posts.cookedHtml: I ended up using https://www.searchseo.io/ to pull all my SEO data into one place. It connects well with my Monday.com setup through webhooks and the API, so I just synced client board updates right into my custom dashboard. Made it way easier to track rankings and tasks without switching between platforms.

posts.author: Kasselmy (Kasselmy)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, using Monday.com’s API with webhooks enables real-time two-way sync—handle custom fields carefully and map them precisely.
